message:
chore(beads): track bd-0pnv1 (reject zero btrfs chunk geometry fields)

Records bd-0pnv1 "Reject zero btrfs chunk geometry fields" in
.beads/issues.jsonl as `in_progress` (assignee cod-fs, priority 2,
labels btrfs/conformance).

Background captured in the bead description: `parse_chunk_item`
currently accepts zero `io_align`, `io_width`, and `sector_size`,
even though those on-disk geometry fields must be nonzero before
logical-to-physical chunk mapping can rely on them. The bead tracks
the planned fix: reject zero geometry fields, add focused
adversarial coverage, and update parity docs.

This commit only updates the bead metadata — the actual parser/test
change will land separately and close the bead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
